<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>While I can't directly create clickable links here, I can guide you on how to create smart search strings that you can use on job boards like Wellfound, BuiltIn, and a16z Jobs. Here's how you can format each search:</div>
<div><b><h2>Wellfound</h2></b></div>
<ul>
<li><b>		Director, Alliances / Channel Sales</b>:Ęsite:wellfound.com &quotCloud Alliances&quot OR &quotMSSP Partnerships&quot OR &quotPartner GTM&quot</li>
<li><b>		Senior GTM Lead / Enterprise AE (AI SaaS)</b>:Ęsite:wellfound.com &quotAI SaaS GTM&quot OR &quotFounding AE&quot OR &quotEnterprise Account Executive AI&quot</li>
<li><b>		Head of GTM / Director of Growth</b>:Ęsite:wellfound.com &quotDirector GTM&quot OR &quotHead of Growth&quot OR &quotSales Strategy AI&quot</li>
<li><b>		GTM Strategy &amp Enablement Lead</b>:Ęsite:wellfound.com &quotGTM Enablement&quot OR &quotSales Strategy &amp Ops&quot OR &quotRevenue Operations&quot</li>
<li><b>		Director of AI Strategy / GTM Innovation</b>:Ęsite:wellfound.com &quotAI GTM Strategy&quot OR &quotAI Business Development&quot OR &quotInnovation Partnerships&quot</li>
</ul>
<div><b><h2>BuiltIn</h2></b></div>
<ul>
<li><b>		Director, Alliances / Channel Sales</b>:Ęsite:builtin.com &quotCloud Alliances&quot OR &quotMSSP Partnerships&quot OR &quotPartner GTM&quot</li>
<li><b>		Senior GTM Lead / Enterprise AE (AI SaaS)</b>:Ęsite:builtin.com &quotAI SaaS GTM&quot OR &quotFounding AE&quot OR &quotEnterprise Account Executive AI&quot</li>
<li><b>		Head of GTM / Director of Growth</b>:Ęsite:builtin.com &quotDirector GTM&quot OR &quotHead of Growth&quot OR &quotSales Strategy AI&quot</li>
<li><b>		GTM Strategy &amp Enablement Lead</b>:Ęsite:builtin.com &quotGTM Enablement&quot OR &quotSales Strategy &amp Ops&quot OR &quotRevenue Operations&quot</li>
<li><b>		Director of AI Strategy / GTM Innovation</b>:Ęsite:builtin.com &quotAI GTM Strategy&quot OR &quotAI Business Development&quot OR &quotInnovation Partnerships&quot</li>
</ul>
<div><b><h2>a16z Jobs</h2></b></div>
<ul>
<li><b>		Director, Alliances / Channel Sales</b>:Ęsite:a16z.com &quotCloud Alliances&quot OR &quotMSSP Partnerships&quot OR &quotPartner GTM&quot</li>
<li><b>		Senior GTM Lead / Enterprise AE (AI SaaS)</b>:Ęsite:a16z.com &quotAI SaaS GTM&quot OR &quotFounding AE&quot OR &quotEnterprise Account Executive AI&quot</li>
<li><b>		Head of GTM / Director of Growth</b>:Ęsite:a16z.com &quotDirector GTM&quot OR &quotHead of Growth&quot OR &quotSales Strategy AI&quot</li>
<li><b>		GTM Strategy &amp Enablement Lead</b>:Ęsite:a16z.com &quotGTM Enablement&quot OR &quotSales Strategy &amp Ops&quot OR &quotRevenue Operations&quot</li>
<li><b>		Director of AI Strategy / GTM Innovation</b>:Ęsite:a16z.com &quotAI GTM Strategy&quot OR &quotAI Business Development&quot OR &quotInnovation Partnerships&quot</li>
</ul>
<div>Copy and paste these strings into your search engine to find job listings that match your criteria on each platform. Let me know if you need further assistance!</div>
